title: AutoComplete
description:
Adds an auto complete feature that auto completes words when pressed TAB key. 
this is a fork of MrSam7k's mod.
body:
Adds an auto complete feature that auto completes words![The Overlay to the mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/504614c544117abec70829d79dc41708b9b3b4d2.png) when pressed TAB key. This uses multiple libraries with ~1,000,000 words across them

Available for English 🇺🇸, Russian 🇷🇺, Portuguese 🇵🇹 and Chinese 🇨🇳 speaking players!          This is a fork of MrSam7K's mod.
